title: T-004 — Drizzle migration: organizations + users + roles + modules core
prompt:
# T-004 — Drizzle migration: organizations/users/roles/modules

## Goal
Create Drizzle schema + SQL migration for §5.1 core identity tables: organizations, users, roles, modules, organization_modules. Include S-U7 invite_token_expires_at and S-U8 seat_limit. RLS enabled on org-scoped tables using the foundation `app.current_org_id()` function (`packages/db/migrations/002-rls-baseline.sql`).

## Files in scope
- packages/db/schema/settings-core.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/00xx_settings_core.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/settings-core.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria (all must hold)
- Given migration is applied, when `\d organizations` is run, then columns include id, slug, name, logo_url, timezone, locale, currency, gs1_prefix, region, tier, seat_limit, onboarding_state, onboarding_completed_at, created_at, updated_at.
- Given migration is applied, when `\d users` is run, then columns include invite_token and invite_token_expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ; CITEXT email; FK role_id → roles(id).
- Given migration is applied and no `app.set_org_context(...)` call has been made in the current transaction, when SELECT runs against organizations/users as `app_user`, then RLS denies all rows (because `app.current_org_id()` returns NULL) AND when pg_policies is inspected the org-context policies' qual/withcheck reference `app.current_org_id()` (the foundation function) with no `current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id')` GUC.
- Given drizzle-kit introspect runs, when compared to schema, then drift is zero.

Note: AC count consolidated from 5→4 by Fixer F8 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost; former AC3 RLS-deny and AC4 pg_policies-GUC-check are semantically co-tested at the same migration-time inspection surface and fused into a single AC with AND clause; original assertions preserved in fused AC text and `test_strategy`).

## Test strategy (RED first)
1. Add a failing test that exercises the acceptance criteria above; tests connect as `app_user` and call `app.set_org_context(session_token, org_id)` for both orgs. The RED command is:
   `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web drizzle-kit migrate && pnpm vitest run packages/db/__tests__/settings-core.test.ts`
2. Run RED — it must fail before any production code is written.
3. Implement the smallest change needed for GREEN.
4. Re-run RED command — must pass.
5. Run `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm lint` in the changed package; both must pass.

## Risk red lines
- Do not read `current_setting('app.tenant_id')` or `current_setting('app.current_org_id')` directly — use the foundation `app.current_org_id()` function so the NULL-safe setter contract is preserved.
- Do not edit files outside the listed scope without documenting why in CLOSEOUT.
- Do not weaken existing acceptance criteria from prior tasks.
- Do not introduce REST endpoints; use Server Actions per stack contract.
- Do not commit secrets or vault keys.

## Closeout evidence required
- changed_files (with line counts)
- exact test commands and outputs (RED→GREEN, typecheck, lint)
- acceptance_criteria_status (one row per AC: pass/fail)
- deviations_from_prd (or "none")
- git_status

Stack: TS + Next.js App Router + Drizzle + pnpm + vitest + Playwright + Server Actions. Primitives in `packages/ui`. PRD: `docs/prd/02-SETTINGS-PRD.md` v3.5.

pipeline_inputs.description: Core identity tables: organizations, users, roles, modules. RLS uses foundation app.current_org_id() function.
pipeline_inputs.details: Honor §5.1 SQL exactly. Use Drizzle pgTable; emit migration via drizzle-kit generate. Add RLS policies `USING (org_id = app.current_org_id())` WITH CHECK (`org_id = app.current_org_id()`) for users/roles/organization_modules; organizations row guarded by id-based policy `id = app.current_org_id()`. Include CITEXT extension enable. Seat_limit nullable. invite_token_expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ. RLS uses foundation `app.current_org_id()` function (Wave0 decision; see `_meta/audits/2026-05-14-architecture-and-cross-cutting-gaps.md` §Tenant-context). AC count consolidated from 5→4 by Fixer F8 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost; original assertions preserved in fused AC2 AND clause).
acceptance_criteria: All 5 tables created with exact §5.1 columns + S-U7/S-U8 fields.

RLS policies enabled and deny by default when app.current_org_id() returns NULL (no app.set_org_context call) AND pg_policies qual/withcheck reference app.current_org_id() (the foundation function) with no current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id') GUC pattern.
test_strategy: RED: write migration test asserting columns + policies; tests connect as app_user and call app.set_org_context(session_token, org_id).
GREEN: emit migration via drizzle-kit, hand-edit policies.
Run `pnpm db:test` (vitest with pglite or test container).
risk_red_lines: Do not read current_setting('app.tenant_id') or current_setting('app.current_org_id') directly — use the foundation app.current_org_id() function so the NULL-safe setter contract is preserved.
Do not weaken RLS by omitting policies.
Do not embed raw secrets in seed.
